headline: Trump-Zelensky Mar-a-Lago Glow-Up 💥🌴 90% Peace BANG but THORNY DIRT 😩🌾
text:
DONALD J. TRUMP 🍊👨‍💼 and VOLODYMYR ZELENSKY 🟡🔵 dropped a MAR-A-LAGO 🔥🏰 PEACE ORGY 💦🤝 in Florida, calling talks 'GREAT' 😍📈 and 'TERRIFIC' 🚀💯 – but that THORNY TERRITORY 🍑🌍 still UNRESOLVED 😤🔒 like a bad breakup! Zelensky spilled ☕ '90% of our 20-POINT SLAY PLAN 📜🔥 locked in' while Trump bragged SECURITY GUARANTEES 🛡️🇺🇦 at '95% THICC' 🍆📊 – no troops or logistics TEA yet tho 👀🚫!

RUSSIA 🐻🇷🇺 been munching 20% UKRAINE LAND 🗺️💥 since Feb '22 INVASION BLOWOUT 💣😩, owning 75% DONETSK 🏭 and 99% LUHANSK 🔥 – DONBAS DEMILIT ZONE 🕊️🚫? Trump like 'SOME LAND TAKEN 😬, SOME UP FOR GRABS 🤑 next few months!' Moscow wants KYIV to GTFO from scraps 🚪💨, but Ukraine simping for FREE ECON ZONE 👮‍♂️💰 policed by their own glow-up forces! Trump flip-flopped harder than a MAGA hat 🧢😂 – Sept said 'TAKE IT BACK 🏃‍♂️💪' then U-TURN 🚗💨: 'TOUGH NUT 🥜, but WE'LL CRACK IT 🔨!'

TRUMP-PUTIN PHONE BONE 📞🐻 earlier, Don says Vlad 'WANTS UKRAINE TO WIN 🏆😏' but NO CEASEFIRE if REFERENDUM VIBES 🗳️🚫 – Ushakov spilling Kremlin tea ☕: Trump called FIRST 🥇, both dunked on EU/UKRAINE TEMP TRUCE as 'PROLONG THE PAIN 😩⏳!' Zelensky hyping NEXT WEEK TALKS 👥📅 and maybe WHITE HOUSE JANUARY BASH 🏛️🥳 with EURO SIMPS like URSULA VON DER LEYEN 👩‍💼🇪🇺 yelling 'IRONCLAD GUARANTEES DAY ONE 🛡️🔥!'

Trump thirsty to add UKRAINE-RUSSIA WAR 🪖💥 to his 'I ENDED IT' flex list 🏆📜 like Art of the Deal 2.0 📚🍆, but warned 'IF TALKS TANK 🚽💥, WAR RAGES ON 😤🔥!' Trilateral US-RU-UA THREESOME 🤝👯‍♂️ floated 'at the right time' ⏰😉 – Wall Street cucks 🤑📉 sweating if PEACE POP 📈 or BUBBLE BURST 💥🫧? MOMMY TRUMP 👩‍🍼🌍 got that MAGIC WAND 🪄 fixing GLOBAL DRAMA like he fixed the economy BRRRR 💰🚀! ZELensky simping HARD 🤤 for that 100% DEAL CLOSE 📉➡️📊 while PUTIN lurks like a bear in the woods 🐻🌲 – STAY TUNED bbs 👀🍿‼️
